description: Combine two SDF shapes using hard boolean logic: union (min), intersection (max), subtraction (max of A with negated B).

functions.name: opSubtraction
functions.visual: Cuts shape d1 out of shape d2

art_failure_modes: Hard edges at boolean boundaries — use smooth variants for organic looks.
Subtraction can create thin shells that alias badly.
Union of overlapping shapes wastes ray marching steps inside the overlap.
